title: 月之暗面 Kimi：因算力紧缺，暂停 C 端新用户订阅
content:
月之暗面 Kimi 即日起暂停 C 端新用户订阅，将全部算力用于保障已订阅用户权益，同时全速推进算力扩容，待新算力到位后逐步恢复订阅。后续新订阅用户的主权益与 Kimi Code 权益将拆分，以精准匹配算力、保障用户体验。 媒体报道

title: 实习生，月入12万
content: AI talent competition has intensified dramatically, with DeepSeek offering top interns 5,500 yuan daily (over 120,000 yuan monthly) to attract elite candidates from programs like Tsinghua's Yao Class. Major tech firms including Tencent, ByteDance, and Huawei are aggressively recruiting younger candidates earlier—some targeting high schoolers—with compensation packages reaching millions annually. The trend reflects a fundamental shift: companies now view young, adaptable AI researchers as decisive competitive assets capable of transforming industry direction, with traditional hiring timelines accelerated and compensation structures increasingly resembling Silicon Valley's war for talent.
eventKey: 实习生-月入12万
normalizedTitle: 实习生 月入12万

title: 900 万副 AI 眼镜连夜「上锁」，就因为一颗小白灯
content: Meta is updating 9 million AI glasses to permanently disable cameras if the privacy LED is tampered with, following concerns about covert recording. The white indicator light signals when recording occurs, but underground services have offered to drill out LEDs. New York courts and other venues have banned camera-equipped glasses entirely. The issue highlights broader tensions: as cameras become smaller and more ambient in AI devices, maintaining public trust requires clear boundaries, rules on data use, and putting protection burden on manufacturers rather than unsuspecting bystanders.

title: DeepSeek V4“满血版”曝光了，最快明天发布
content: DeepSeek V4 is reportedly launching imminently, with GA versions in two tiers: Flash and Pro. Early testers note near-Opus 4.8-level performance, improved coding and agent capabilities, and better 3D/SVG generation, though it requires more iteration rounds than competitors and likely trails Kimi K3. Pricing introduces surge-based billing: Pro outputs at $0.87-1.74 per million tokens, Flash at $0.28-0.56—still dramatically undercutting rivals like Fable 5's $50. The older deepseek-chat and deepseek-reasoner models will be discontinued July 24.

title: 这，可能是今年WAIC最惊艳的图片！
content: SenseNova U1 Pro, a new Chinese image generation model from SenseTime launched at WAIC 2026, produces native 8K images and functions as an autonomous design system. Unlike standard models requiring extensive human refinement, U1 Pro independently drafts, refines, color-corrects, verifies, and delivers finished work. It handles complex multi-step projects like 24-solar-term scrolls, scientific posters, and commercial film posters with detailed text and coherent composition. The model uses 32×32 patches to manage computational demands of high resolution while preserving fine details through adaptive noise control and overlap techniques. SenseTime positions this as shifting image generation from single outputs to system-level content delivery, analogous to AI coding's evolution from completion to autonomous agents.
eventKey: 可能是今年waic最惊艳的图片
normalizedTitle: 这 可能是今年waic最惊艳的图片

title: 二代“豆包手机”上手体验：左手抖音右手瑞幸，让App们开始排队打工
content: Nubia's second-gen "Doubao phone," the NaviX Ultra, debuted at WAIC 2026 as a collaboration with ByteDance. Unlike conventional smartphones, this "agent phone" operates apps autonomously to complete tasks for users, such as finding videos on Douyin, booking flights, or ordering coffee simultaneously, with pending tasks queued automatically. It features a glass-like UI, real-time execution progress displays, and proactive memory that learns user habits. Upgrades from the first generationinclude improved voice recognition in noisy environments, integrated agent architecture, and refined hardware design. The development overcame four challenges: translating user needs to experiences, making agent capabilities native to the phone, ensuring stable performance, and addressing security and privacy.
eventKey: 二代“豆包手机”上手体验-左手抖音右手瑞幸-让app们开始排队打工
normalizedTitle: 二代“豆包手机”上手体验 左手抖音右手瑞幸 让app们开始排队打工

title: WAIC机器人狂卷落地：细分赛道爆发，VLA 与世界模型争做大脑
content: At the 2026 WAIC in Shanghai, humanoid robots shifted from flashy demonstrations to real-world deployment, with companies placing 60 full-size units throughout the venue as staff. Key trends included: Zhijiang's "deployment year" theme with industrial and service robots; Digirobot's 560 TOPS computing platform for developers; Magic Atom's three-model lineup for diverse scenarios; Leju's 95% domestic component supply chain; Qianjue's tactile intelligence for precision tasks; and Qiyuan's transformable consumer robot. The industry debated VLA versus world models for robot "brains," with most opting for hybrid approaches. Supply chain specialization replaced vertical integration, with domestic core component availability exceeding 75%, signaling humanoid robots' transition from laboratory curiosities to scalable commercial products.
eventKey: waic机器人狂卷落地-细分赛道爆发-vla-与世界模型争做大脑
normalizedTitle: waic机器人狂卷落地 细分赛道爆发 vla 与世界模型争做大脑

title: 优衣库最值得买的系列，可能要没了
content: Uniqlo U series, the decade-long designer collaboration with Christophe Lemaire and Sarah-Linh Tran, may end in 2026. Unlike typical short-term fashion collaborations, U series succeeded by embedding Lemaire's design philosophy into Uniqlo's permanent organization through a Paris R&D center, creating a distinctive aesthetic that reshaped the brand's identity. Chinese brands like Bosideng and Peacebird tried similar designer partnerships for premium positioning but mostly achieved temporary marketing buzz. The key lesson: designer collaborations become true brand assets only when design capabilities are institutionalized internally, not merely borrowed for seasonal hype.
eventKey: 优衣库最值得买的系列-可能要没了
normalizedTitle: 优衣库最值得买的系列 可能要没了

title: WAIC五位首席科学家交锋：多模态是LLM的“外挂”，还是下一代智能的“灵魂”？
content: At a WAIC 2026 forum, five chief scientists debated whether multimodal AI is merely an extension of large language models or the foundation of next-generation intelligence. Key分歧 emerged: Qiu Xipeng argued language remains central with multimodal alignment; Zhao Deli contended multimodal models represent a new paradigm for physical-world intelligence; Zhang Xiangyu focused on learning paradigms and autonomous learning capabilities; Liu Ziwei used Plato's cave allegory to argue AI must move beyond language's "shadows." Consensus formed that current bottlenecks span data scarcity, non-native multimodal architectures, and inadequate memory mechanisms. Looking five years ahead, participants warned against overestimating agent autonomy while underestimating AI's societal transformation.
eventKey: waic五位首席科学家交锋-多模态是llm的“外挂”-还是下一代智能的“灵魂”
normalizedTitle: waic五位首席科学家交锋 多模态是llm的“外挂” 还是下一代智能的“灵魂”

title: 荣耀、豆包领衔，WAIC上的AI手机，开始跟你抢事做了
content: At WAIC 2026, AI phones shifted from adding AI features to autonomous Agents that complete tasks for users. Nubia's NaviX Ultra with Doubao assistant and Stepix's STEPX Neo with Amoo agent demonstrate phones that can cross apps and execute multi-step commands. Honor's Robot Phone introduced a mechanical gimbal camera for environmental awareness. The industry is moving toward "agent-native" operating systems like Step AOS and Honor's Agentic OS, combining on-device models with cloud processing. Security and reliability remain key challenges as manufacturers compete to make AI phones truly autonomous.

title: 刚刚，法兰西再次战败了！ | 原文
content: England defeated France 6-4 in the World Cup third-place match in Miami. England scored four first-half goals through Rice, Konsa, and Saka, who completed a hat-trick. France rallied with four second-half goals from Mbappé, Barcola, and Dembélé. The result marks England's best World Cup performance since their 1966 title. Mbappé reached 10 total goals, positioning him for the Golden Boot award.

title: Meta 洽谈向 Anthropic 出租算力，交易规模至高达 100 亿美元
content: Meta is in discussions to rent AI data center computing power to Anthropic in a deal worth up to $10 billion over two years. Anthropic proposed the arrangement in June; Meta is evaluating it. Payment would be monthly, with early termination rights for both parties. The scale is one-third of Anthropic's May contract with SpaceX. Talks remain preliminary and may not result in a finalized agreement.

title: 我国日均 Token 调用量增长超千倍
content: China's daily AI token calls surged over 1,000-fold from about 100 billion in early 2024 to 140 trillion by late March 2026, according to CAICT vice president Wei Liang. Tokens measure large language model processing and billing. The growth, driven by AI agents triggering multiple model calls per user command, signals booming computational demand and the emergence of a new "token economy" encompassing metering, scheduling, pricing, and trading.
eventKey: 我国日均-token-调用量增长超千倍
normalizedTitle: 我国日均 token 调用量增长超千倍

title: 手搓了一个 agent 架构能减少 长 coding 任务的 llm 往返和 token 开销 80%左右。有 benchmark！
content: A developer created an agent architecture using macro commands in a RAG system to reduce LLM round-trips and token costs for long coding tasks by approximately 80%. Traditional Codex workflows require 5–6 sequential rounds (applying patches, building, testing, reading media files), while this approach completes the same steps in a single round. Benchmarks using Codex and GPT-5.6-Sol High on DeepSWE tasks showed 40–80% fewer interaction rounds and proportional token savings, with macro configurations achieving 65–80% pass rates at significantly lower costs compared to standard Codex CLI.

normalizedTitle: 手搓了一个 agent 架构能减少 长 coding 任务的 llm 往返和 token 开销 80 左右 有 benchmark
